task_completion.description: Open the high_drift_rocket.ork design in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket application window is open showing the rocket design tree with the loaded high_drift_rocket.

task_completion.description: Add a spill hole to the parachute while keeping the outer diameter unchanged
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Parachute configuration dialog is open, showing a spill hole diameter greater than 0, while the main parachute diameter remains exactly 36 inches (or 0.9144m).

task_completion.description: Run the simulation to achieve the target ground hit velocity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket Flight Simulations tab or results window shows a completed simulation run with a Ground hit velocity between 5.0 m/s and 5.5 m/s. The wind speed should still be visible as 6.0 m/s.

task_completion.description: Save the modified rocket design to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window showing 'spill_hole_optimized.ork' being saved in the /home/ga/Documents/rockets/ directory, or the OpenRocket title bar reflecting the new filename.

task_completion.description: Create the Drift Reduction Report with the required data
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'drift_report.txt' in /home/ga/Documents/exports/ containing the final ground hit velocity and the final simulated drift distance.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design and run simulations rather than manually editing the XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket graphical interface (e.g., parachute configuration dialog, simulation run buttons).

integrity.description: The values in the drift report match the actual simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ground hit velocity and drift distance typed into drift_report.txt match the exact numbers displayed in the OpenRocket simulation results table.

integrity.description: The agent did not change the wind speed or rocket mass to cheat the velocity/drift requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Simulation edit conditions or results table confirm the wind speed is still exactly 6.0 m/s, and there is no evidence of mass components being removed or altered in the rocket design tree.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original parachute diameter is exactly 0.9144m (36 inches) and must not be changed. The simulation wind speed is exactly 6.0 m/s and must not be changed. The target ground hit velocity must be strictly between 5.0 m/s and 5.5 m/s. The final optimized model must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/spill_hole_optimized.ork. The final report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/exports/drift_report.txt.
